summary: Integrate the atomic IndexedDB artifact cache into the verified OpenSCAD WASM loader with fresh integrity checks, offline use, and fail-closed recovery.
specSections: FR-4.7 HTTP plus IndexedDB cache, progress, and offline operation

decisions.topic: Freshly verified all-or-nothing offline artifact pairs
decisions.decision: Derive the cache key from the schema marker plus both exact artifact paths, decoded lengths, and SHA-256 values; accept a cached pair only after both bytes are copied, length-checked, and freshly hashed; emit cache completion only after both pass; evict only deterministic integrity failures; otherwise fetch and verify both network artifacts before one paired write.
decisions.rationale: The cache is persistent executable storage and cannot become a trust oracle. A complete identity prevents cross-build reuse, fresh dual hashing detects storage corruption, pair-level progress avoids claiming success for discarded bytes, operational WebCrypto failures preserve the only offline copy, and cancellation is enforced before cache access and again before module execution.

testEvidence.criterion: A valid pair runs offline, an invalid pair refreshes both assets, and cache availability cannot weaken a verified online load
testEvidence.test: Exercise offline hits, verified paired writes, corrupt-pair eviction, offline corruption refusal, read failures, and write failures through injected cache and loader seams.

red.outcome: RED: all 5 focused cache-integration tests failed because the loader did not consult, write, or evict the cache.

green.outcome: GREEN: 1 focused file and all 5 initial integration tests passed in 524 ms.

testEvidence.criterion: Cache-hit cancellation, operational hash failures, same-length tampering, version identity, and pair-level progress survive adversarial review
testEvidence.test: Add an already-aborted hit, content-sensitive digest fake and same-length tamper, WebCrypto rejection, exact production-key parse, and independent mutations of each path, length, and hash field.

red.outcome: RED after independent 0/0/4/1/0 review: 4 of 9 tests failed and 5 passed, reproducing cache-hit cancellation bypass, premature partial-pair progress, destructive WebCrypto-failure eviction, and the absent exported key-derivation proof.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/platform-web/openscad-wasm-loader-cache.test.ts; pnpm.cmd exec biome check src/platform-web/openscad-wasm-loader.ts tests/platform-web/openscad-wasm-loader-cache.test.ts; pnpm.cmd typecheck
green.outcome: GREEN: 1 focused file and all 9 tests passed in 631 ms; focused Biome checked both files with zero diagnostics after one import-order correction; TypeScript exited 0.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
